semantic_rule: A seed assignment requires a bounded decimal integer used by a manifest, seed family, execution command, world record, or scientific runner. Hash substrings, floats with an adjacent decimal point, byte counts, timestamps, line numbers, and explicit invalid-seed guard tests are not assignments.
